mapper.select: SELECT id, score, issue, body_temp as bodyTemp, activity_level as activityLevel, breed, area, current_weight_kg as currentWeightKg, current_month as currentMonth FROM pig WHERE score >= 80 OR issue IS NOT NULL
SELECT id, score, issue, body_temp as bodyTemp, activity_level as activityLevel, breed, area, current_weight_kg as currentWeightKg, current_month as currentMonth FROM pig ORDER BY id

SELECT id, score, issue, body_temp as bodyTemp, activity_level as activityLevel, breed, area, current_weight_kg as currentWeightKg, current_month as currentMonth FROM pig ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, score, issue, body_temp as bodyTemp, activity_level as activityLevel, breed, area, current_weight_kg as currentWeightKg, current_month as currentMonth FROM pig WHERE id = #{pigId}

SELECT id, score, issue, body_temp as bodyTemp, activity_level as activityLevel, breed, area, current_weight_kg as currentWeightKg, current_month as currentMonth FROM pig WHERE (score >= #{threshold} OR issue IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pig WHERE (score >= #{threshold} OR issue IS NOT NULL)
